issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Skill file lacks separate realistic example demonstrations.

scenarios.name: Affected CI pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentions running tests across packages but lacks the specific nx affected -t test command and nx.json targetDefaults cache config; treatment uses both the affected command and configures cache in nx.json with dependsOn.

scenarios.name: Init Nx in existing monorepo
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives generic monorepo advice and may not surface npx nx init nor demonstrate cache benefit via run-many; treatment uses nx init, configures targetDefaults cache:true, and shows nx run-many -t build for shared caching.
